item.title: Soham murderer Ian Huntley seriously injured in prison attack
item.description: The 52-year-old is serving a life sentence after being convicted of murdering schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman.

item.title: England consider spinner Ahmed for Colombo turner
item.description: England will consider leg-spinner Rehan Ahmed for Friday's T20 World Cup match against New Zealand with spinning conditions expected.

item.title: Woman angry at lack of prosecution after she fell from window fleeing triple killer
item.description: A former neighbour of Valdo Calocane was told he could have killed her, years before the attacks.

item.title: Tracey Emin says her artwork My Bed would be 'tidy, clean and boring' if she made it today
item.description: Her Turner Prize-nominated messy bed caused a stir in the late 1990s and is now going back on display.

item.title: Traitor Rachel on winning the show, her mum's death - and what's next
item.description: Rachel Duffy has spoken publicly for the first time about winning The Traitors and then losing her mother.
